description_long: This object visually resembles a classic sunny-side-up fried egg, featuring an irregular, organic white base with a slightly wavy edge and a central, circular yellow-orange area representing the yolk. The white portion is broad, thin, and spread out, mimicking the way egg whites naturally flow and set when cooked on a flat surface. The yolk is smooth, slightly raised, and has a uniform color, contrasting with the matte, pale white of the surrounding area. The edges of the white are uneven and naturalistic, lacking any sharp corners or symmetry. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, especially on the yolk, suggesting a freshly cooked appearance. There are no visible cracks, patterns, or additional textures beyond the color contrast between the yolk and the white.
description: A realistic, sunny-side-up fried egg with a wavy white base and a smooth, round yellow yolk in the center. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible patterns.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the full, irregular white base and the central yolk, with the left edge appearing more extended.
description_view_1: This view highlights the right side of the egg, where the white base appears more compact and the yolk remains centrally positioned.
description_view_2: The egg is viewed from a different angle, emphasizing the upper right edge, with the yolk still clearly visible in the center.
description_view_3: The egg is seen from a perspective that makes the lower edge appear more pronounced, maintaining the central yolk and the organic shape of the white.
attribute_location: dining table, kitchen countertop, or food tray
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the yolk facing upward and centered
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a breakfast meal or food display, typically served on a plate or tray.
